articles.title: Germany want Klopp talks as Nagelsmann resigns
articles.summary: The German football association is seeking talks with Jurgen Klopp about becoming their men's national team coach after Julian Nagelsmann resigned.

articles.title: After World Cup goals are last year's signings finally set to deliver for Newcastle?
articles.summary: Anthony Elanga and Yoane Wissa both struggled in their first season at Newcastle, but five goals between at the World Cup them suggest things will be different next term.

articles.title: Portugal through to last 16 after dramatic victory over Croatia
articles.summary: Portugal beat Croatia 2-1 with goals from Cristiano Ronaldo and Goncalo Ramos after a chaotic second-half in Toronto to set up a last 16 tie with Iberian rivals Spain.

articles.title: Ronaldo has equaliser ruled out for offside
